controlling_principle: Run the real integration under controlled boundaries, preserve each genuine failure, and repair only proven blockers.

stages.name: Raw Edge prediction execution
stages.first_failure_message: The raw marriage reached the predictions_raw persistence boundary.
stages.first_failure_sql: insert into predictions_raw (match_id, sport, market, prediction, confidence, volatility, odds, metadata) values ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8::jsonb) returning *;

observed_runtime_progress: Configured Scout FIP path bypassed provider input

attempts.conclusion: Scout-to-Edge intake and prediction processing are connected. The first hard blocker was prediction persistence.
